name: Foodics
description: Saudi cloud-based POS and restaurant management platform with APIs and integrations for F&B operators in MENA.

seo.title: Foodics — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Foodics: Saudi cloud-based POS and restaurant management platform with APIs and integrations for F&B operators in MENA.

when_to_use: Cloud POS and restaurant management for Saudi and MENA F&B operators
Menu management, inventory, and payment processing integration for MENA restaurants
Franchise management and multi-branch POS for restaurant chains in Saudi
API-based POS integration for delivery aggregators in GCC markets

review.verdict: Best pick for MENA F&B operators — narrower than a gateway, but purpose-built for restaurants.
review.best_for: Restaurants and F&B chains in Saudi Arabia, UAE, and broader MENA
review.not_for: Non-F&B merchants or developers wanting a pure payment API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
